accepted.reason: Prime testing and quadratic run-length search is a compact algorithmic loop benchmark.
Coordinate-walk visitation counting with alternating agents provides clean integer-state kernels.
Polar sampling radius/angle helper loops are useful numerical preprocessing kernels.
AA-tree skew/split and persistent insert operations are strong structured data-structure patterns.
Null/NaN/Inf mask scanning is a practical vector/object traversal kernel.
Directional run-length win detection is a clear board-search optimization target.
Density/Fock matrix assembly loops represent high-value scientific computing kernels.
Mixture-normal density and renormalization utilities are robust probabilistic numeric patterns.

skipped.reason: Exception-state iterator behavior test, not a standalone optimization kernel.
Game-specific piece recursion and move object semantics are highly domain-bound for GRPO unpaired use.
